Finding: App has core user flows (auth, temple search, navigation) but critical security gaps, broken admin module, no CI/CD, failing tests, and incomplete iOS setup. Android-only release is possible after fixing blockers.
Recommendation: Address all Critical/High items before store submission. Target Android first if iOS is not in scope.

Finding: Monorepo contains apps/CleanDD (React Native mobile), apps/web (CRA admin), backend (Express stub), and packages/ shared libs.
Recommendation: Document monorepo structure in root README.

Finding: No .git repository detected in workspace. Cannot verify history, branching, or what is tracked vs ignored.
Recommendation: Initialize git, add .gitignore rules, and ensure secrets/build artifacts are not committed.

Finding: 26+ duplicate *_1.* files across web, backend, and root (e.g. package_1.json, AdminPage_1.js). Indicates merge/copy clutter.
Recommendation: Remove duplicate *_1.* files and consolidate on single source files.

Finding: Firebase and API client code duplicated in root packages/ and apps/CleanDD/packages/.
Recommendation: Pick one shared package location; avoid drift between copies.

Finding: No root README with setup, env vars, build, or deploy instructions.
Recommendation: Add root README covering mobile, web, Firebase, and release steps.

Finding: Default React Native CLI boilerplate; does not describe TirthDarshi-specific setup.
Recommendation: Replace with project-specific onboarding and build guide.

Finding: No .env.example file. Secrets are hardcoded instead of documented env vars.
Recommendation: Add .env.example for MAPS_API_KEY, Firebase keys (reference only), and signing config.

Finding: No CI/CD at repo root (no GitHub Actions, Fastlane, EAS, Bitrise, etc.).
Recommendation: Add CI for lint, test, and release builds on every PR.

Finding: No automated AAB/IPA generation or artifact publishing configured.
Recommendation: Set up Android AAB and iOS archive pipelines with signing from secure secrets store.

Finding: Only 1 Jest smoke test (App.test.tsx). Test suite fails: cannot parse PNG assets from @react-navigation (missing moduleNameMapper). 0 screen-level or E2E tests.
Recommendation: Fix Jest config; add tests for auth, temple fetch, navigation, and critical screens.

Finding: XCTest boilerplate still expects default Welcome to React template text.
Recommendation: Update or remove stale iOS tests.

Finding: No custom tests found in apps/web/src (only CRA defaults).
Recommendation: Add admin CRUD and auth flow tests if web admin is part of release.

Finding: npm run lint runs but reports many warnings and at least 1 error (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in App.js). Lint not enforced in CI.
Recommendation: Fix lint errors; add lint gate to CI.

Finding: ~80+ console.log/warn/error calls across app screens (TempleSearchScreen alone has 46). ProGuard log stripping is commented out.
Recommendation: Strip or gate logs behind __DEV__; enable ProGuard log removal for release.

Finding: TempleSearchScreen.js is ~2882 lines. Hard to maintain and test.
Recommendation: Refactor into hooks, components, and services.

Finding: No React ErrorBoundary, Sentry, Firebase Crashlytics, or analytics integration found.
Recommendation: Add crash reporting and global error boundary before production.

Finding: Release build has minifyEnabled true, shrinkResources true, Hermes enabled, versionName 1.0.9, versionCode 10, targetSdk 35. enableProguardInReleaseBuilds variable is unused (dead code).
Recommendation: Clean up unused ProGuard flag variable; verify release AAB on real devices.

Finding: Release keystore passwords hardcoded as 123456 in build.gradle. thirtdarshi.keystore present in android/app/.
Recommendation: Move signing credentials to env/CI secrets; use strong passwords; never commit keystore passwords.

Finding: Release keystore file exists in project directory (gitignore attempts to exclude *.keystore except debug).
Recommendation: Store keystore only in secure vault; rotate if ever exposed.

Finding: targetSdkVersion 35 and compileSdk 35 — meets current Play requirements.
Recommendation: Keep target SDK updated with annual Play policy changes.

Finding: INTERNET, ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION declared. Background location intentionally removed (good for Play compliance). allowBackup=false.
Recommendation: Document location data usage in Play Console Data Safety form.

Finding: google-services.json includes com.thirtdarshi.app client (alongside legacy com.sukusala.theerthakshetra). Config appears present for current package.
Recommendation: Verify Firebase console has correct SHA-1/SHA-256 for release keystore.

Finding: Release build intermediates and mapping.txt exist on disk but no .aab/.apk found in outputs search. Build may have been partial or cleaned.
Recommendation: Produce and smoke-test signed release AAB before Play upload.

Finding: Extensive rules present but still reference placeholder com.yourapp package. Release minification is enabled.
Recommendation: Update keep rules to com.thirtdarshi.app; test release build for Firebase/Maps crashes.

Finding: MAPS_API_KEY committed in plaintext (AIzaSy...). File is in .gitignore but exists locally and may be tracked elsewhere.
Recommendation: Use env-injected keys; restrict key by package name + SHA-1 in Google Cloud Console.

Finding: local.properties exists with machine-specific SDK path. Listed in .gitignore but present in workspace.
Recommendation: Ensure not committed; use ANDROID_HOME in CI.

Finding: Xcode project, Podfile, AppDelegate, LaunchScreen, PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy present.
Recommendation: Run pod install and verify archive on macOS CI.

Finding: GoogleService-Info.plist not found. Firebase Auth/Firestore will not work on iOS.
Recommendation: Add iOS app in Firebase console and include GoogleService-Info.plist.

Finding: NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription is empty string. App Store will reject.
Recommendation: Add clear user-facing location purpose string (EN + Telugu if localized).

Finding: app.json displayName is TirthDarshi but iOS CFBundleDisplayName is CleanDD.
Recommendation: Align branding across stores and app metadata.

Finding: Privacy manifest exists with API reasons; NSPrivacyCollectedDataTypes is empty.
Recommendation: Review and declare collected data types for App Store privacy labels.

Finding: Firebase web config with apiKey hardcoded in at least 3 files. Keys are extractable from APK.
Recommendation: Use Firebase App Check; enforce Firestore/Storage rules server-side; rotate exposed keys.

Check Item: Google Maps/Directions API key in JS
Finding: GOOGLE_API_KEY hardcoded in JS and used for Directions API calls from client.
Recommendation: Proxy directions through backend; restrict API key in GCP.

Finding: Admin access gated only by client-side email check (admin@temple.com). Any Firebase user with that email gets admin UI; no server-side role verification.
Recommendation: Use Firebase Custom Claims or backend admin API with proper RBAC.

Finding: No firestore.rules or storage.rules in repo. App writes directly to Firestore from client (admin CRUD, temple fetch). Security depends entirely on console rules (not auditable).
Recommendation: Add and deploy restrictive Firestore/Storage rules; deny open read/write.

Finding: gitignore covers .env, keystores, gradle.properties, build/ — good intent. But secrets still exist in committed JS and google-services.json.
Recommendation: Audit git history; rotate all exposed keys; use secret manager.

Finding: NSAllowsArbitraryLoads is false; NSAllowsLocalNetworking true for dev. Good baseline.
Recommendation: Keep ATS strict in production.

Finding: Firebase email auth with validation, error mapping, and loading states implemented.
Recommendation: Enable email verification if required by policy.

Finding: Google Sign-In configured with webClientId. Depends on correct SHA-1 and package in Firebase.
Recommendation: Verify Google Sign-In on release-signed Android build.

Finding: Users must accept Terms & Conditions checkbox before signup; links to TermsAndConditionsScreen.
Recommendation: Ensure terms URL is also in Play/App Store listings.

Finding: Terms screen exists with sections on account, location, privacy (Last Updated Jan 2026).
Recommendation: Have legal review; add separate Privacy Policy screen if required.

Finding: No hosted privacy policy URL found in codebase for Play Console / App Store Connect requirement.
Recommendation: Publish privacy policy page and link in store listings and app.

Finding: NavigationProvider uses placeholder title Your Company Name and Terms and Conditions Title.
Recommendation: Replace with real company name and legal text for Maps SDK.

Finding: Unauthenticated users see Login/SignUp; authenticated users see main stack; admin branch separated.
Recommendation: Add session timeout / re-auth for sensitive actions.

Finding: Fetches entire temples collection then filters in JS. Works for small datasets; does not scale.
Recommendation: Add Firestore indexes and server-side queries as data grows.

Finding: Google Maps Navigation SDK integrated with location permissions handler. Complex dependency stack.
Recommendation: Test navigation on low-end devices and poor network; verify billing limits.

Finding: English and Telugu support in UI strings and temple data by lang key.
Recommendation: Complete i18n audit; resConfigs en only on Android may limit resources.

Finding: NetworkCheck component exists but is NOT wired into App.js. Uses @react-native-community/netinfo which is NOT in package.json.
Recommendation: Either add netinfo dependency and wrap app, or remove dead code.

Finding: firebaseController imports are commented out but getAllTemples/addTemple/etc. are still called (runtime ReferenceError). CSV upload uses DocumentPicker.getDocumentAsync (Expo API) but package is react-native-document-picker (uses .pick()). Uses FileSystem but imports RNFS.
Recommendation: Fix imports; use DocumentPicker.pick() and RNFS.readFile(); test admin flows end-to-end.

Finding: CRA admin with Firestore CRUD and CSV upload appears more complete than mobile admin.
Recommendation: Decide if web admin is production path; secure with Firebase Auth + rules.

Finding: Minimal Express server on port 3001 with only GET /temples. No package.json, no deployment config. firestoreAdapter imports non-existent apps/mobile/firebase.
Recommendation: Fix or remove backend; app primarily uses Firestore directly.

Finding: Some client code references localhost:3001 but production path uses Firestore client.
Recommendation: Remove dead localhost references to avoid confusion.

Finding: React Native 0.76.9, React 18.3.1, Firebase 23.x, Node >=18. Modern stack.
Recommendation: Run npm audit and pin versions for reproducible builds.

Finding: idb package (web IndexedDB) in mobile app; NetworkCheck needs netinfo but not listed. DivyaDesamsApp references missing react-native-stepper-tour.
Recommendation: Remove unused deps; fix missing deps.

Finding: npm audit was not executed as part of this audit.
Recommendation: Run npm audit fix and review high/critical CVEs before release.

Finding: package.json version 0.0.1 vs Android versionName 1.0.9 — inconsistent.
Recommendation: Align semantic versioning across package.json and native builds.

Finding: Internal name CleanDD; user-facing TirthDarshi in app.json. iOS still shows CleanDD.
Recommendation: Finalize store listing name and icon assets.

Finding: App collects email, location, and uses Google/Firebase. Data Safety form not verifiable from code.
Recommendation: Complete Google Play Data Safety and Apple Privacy Nutrition labels accurately.

Finding: Android build is more complete than iOS (Firebase plist missing, empty location string). Admin and security blockers affect both.
Recommendation: If releasing soon: target Android Play Store only after fixing PR-019, PR-033–PR-036, PR-050, PR-043.
